Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
2.2.7 Newbie Warning Messages
With so many new
things
to take in, it can be easy to
go
astray during your
first
days
in the realms of
Achaea
.
To
help
you a little, we will give you warning
messages
one
time
only when you
do
something
that may have important long-term implications.
We'll give you a warning:
- when you
attack
a
denizen
that is loyal to another adventurer or
organisation, because it's likely that that person or
organisation will be angry and may well attack or
kill
you, or
make you an
enemy
.
- when a
corpse
you are carrying
decays
for the first
time, since so many seem so distressed and confused
when it happens.
You may see
other
warnings as well!
Achaea is developed and published by
Iron Realms Entertainment.

Privacy Overview
This website uses cookies so that we can provide you with the best user experience possible. Cookie information is stored in your browser and performs functions such as recognising you when you return to our website and helping our team to understand which sections of the website you find most interesting and useful.
